hero.features_subtitle: Tools designed for business owners who have no time to lose.

landing.trust_bar: THE SYSTEM FEATURED IN THE FINANCIAL MARKET

financial.title: Total Financial Control
financial.desc: Complete management of Accounts Payable and Receivable. Organize your cash flow by categories, cost centers, and receive due date alerts.

crm.title: CRM & Sales
crm.desc: Contact management, interaction history, and sales pipeline. Turn leads into customers with an organized flow.

quotes.title: Quotes & Orders
quotes.desc: Create professional quotes with one click, send via WhatsApp, and convert into sales quickly with status tracking.

loyalty.title: Loyalty Club
loyalty.desc: Build customer loyalty with subscription and recurrence plans. Generate cash predictability with automatic billing.

fiscal.title: Invoices (NF-e/NFS-e)
fiscal.desc: Issue service and product invoices directly through the system. Complete history with XML and PDF download in one click.

financial.title: Master every cent of your business
financial.desc: Forget complicated spreadsheets. Lucro Certo offers a complete Analytical Ledger for you to see exactly where your money is going.
financial.p1: Accounts Payable and Receivable: Absolute control of deadlines and values.
financial.p3: Digital Attachments: Keep receipts and invoices directly in the transaction.
financial.p4: Monthly Cash Flow: Forecast balance for the coming months.

radar.title: Let the AI hunt your clients
radar.desc: Our exclusive technology maps Google Maps and Social Networks for your ideal client. The system not only finds them, but also qualifies and reaches out automatically.
radar.p3: Filters by region and business niche

copilot.title: Your Brand on Autopilot with Brand Kit
copilot.desc: Stop wasting hours thinking about what to post. Copilot creates professional schedules, artwork, and captions synced with your Brand Kit (logo, colors, and tone of voice).
copilot.p1: Centralized Brand Kit: Your logo and colors on everything.
copilot.p2: Captions & Video Generation: AI that understands your business.
copilot.p3: Scheduled Autopilot: Automatic postings on Instagram.

crm.title: Turn Leads into Loyal Customers
crm.desc: Complete sales pipeline management. Organize your contacts and never miss an opportunity.
crm.p1: Visual Sales Funnel: Track negotiations step-by-step.
crm.p2: Interaction History: Everything documented on the client profile.
crm.p3: Follow-up Automation: Automatic reminders for your team.

quotes.title: Proposals that Sell for You
quotes.desc: Create beautiful quotes in seconds and send them via WhatsApp to your clients with digital approval.
quotes.p1: Customizable Models: Templates matching your company's identity.
quotes.p2: Fast Digital Signature: Your clients approve directly on their mobile.
quotes.p3: Reading Status: Know exactly when the client opened the proposal.

whatsapp.title: Automatic Billing Reminder
whatsapp.desc: Reduce default rates with smart payment reminders sent directly to your clients' WhatsApp.
whatsapp.p1: Due Date Reminders: Automatic messages via WhatsApp.
whatsapp.p2: Direct Payment Links: Send invoice ready for payment (Pix/Card).
whatsapp.p3: Automatic Box Reconciliation: Automatically updated as soon as the client pays.

multicompany.title: Manage Multiple Businesses
multicompany.desc: Switch between companies with one click. Get a consolidated view of all your units without leaving the system.
multicompany.p1: Data Consolidation: See total profit of all companies combined.
multicompany.p2: Differentiated Access: Define who can see each branch.
multicompany.p3: Linked Inventory: Move products between stores easily.

multicurrency.title: Expand your horizons without borders
multicurrency.desc: Lucro Certo is now global. Manage accounts in BRL, USD, EUR, PYG, or GBP with automatic conversion and consolidated reports in a single screen.
multicurrency.p1: Smart Conversion: Exchange rates automatically updated.
multicurrency.p2: International Billing: Receive in any currency.
multicurrency.p3: Global Vision: Understand the total profit of your empire.

billing.title: Stress-Free Subscriber Management
billing.desc: Sell access to your system and let our platform take care of the rest. Automatic billing reminders, block default users, and instant renewal.
billing.p1: Billing Reminders: Automatic WhatsApp messages before due date.
billing.p2: Integrated Checkout: Your clients pay via PIX or Card in seconds.
billing.p3: Centralized Management: Admin panel for total control of associates.

loyalty.title: Turn your Service Provision into Recurrence
loyalty.desc: No more relying only on one-off sales. With the Loyalty Club, you create benefit plans that your clients pay monthly, ensuring financial stability.
loyalty.p1: Personalized Plans: Define which services and discounts are part of each tier.
loyalty.p2: Automatic Cashback: Encourage new purchases by returning part of the value.
loyalty.p3: Subscription Management: Control who is active, overdue, or in grace period.

fiscal.title: Issue Invoices in Seconds
fiscal.desc: Say goodbye to slow city hall portals. With Lucro Certo, you issue NF-e and NFS-e directly from your billing, with auto-filled details.
fiscal.p1: 1-Click Issuance: Generate invoices directly from approved quotes.
fiscal.p2: Centralized History: XML and PDF organized and ready for your accountant.
fiscal.p3: Automatic Delivery: Your clients receive invoices by email and WhatsApp instantly.
fiscal.p4: Full Sync: Status updated in real time with SEFAZ and Municipalities.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know to get started securely.
faq.q1: Does the system accept foreign currencies?
faq.a1: Yes! Lucro Certo now supports BRL, USD, EUR, PYG, and GBP, allowing you to manage international transactions with real-time exchange conversion and consolidated reports.
faq.a2: You can connect your own WhatsApp number to the system. From there, Lucro Certo can send automatic payment reminders, quotes, and invoice notifications without you typing anything.
faq.q3: Is it hard to set up invoice issuance?
faq.a3: No! Our support team helps you configure your digital certificate (A1). Once configured, the system automatically fills out and issues invoices based on each sale.
faq.a4: Absolutely. We use bank-grade encryption and secure hosting on Google Cloud. Your data is confidential and protected by data protection laws (LGPD).
faq.q5: Is there a commitment contract or can I cancel anytime?
faq.a5: There is no contract or commitment. You can cancel your subscription at any time directly through the system panel, without fines or bureaucracy.

pricing.title: The Right Plan for You
pricing.subtitle: No hidden fees. Total transparency for your profit.

b1.desc: Way beyond financial control. Lucro Certo offers real predictability and absolute organization.

b2.desc: Our technology maps the market, qualifies leads, and starts automatic outreach on WhatsApp.

b3.desc: Create schedules, professional artwork, and captions in seconds directly from your phone.

b4.desc: Complete sales pipeline management. Organize your contacts and never miss an opportunity.

b5.desc: Create beautiful quotes in seconds and send them via WhatsApp to your clients.

b6.desc: Reduce default rates with smart payment reminders directly in their favorite app.

b7.desc: Switch between companies with one click. Get a consolidated view of all your business units.

b8.desc: BRL, USD, EUR, PYG, or GBP. Now Lucro Certo accepts transactions in multiple currencies with smart conversion.

b9.desc: Issue NF-e and NFS-e in seconds directly from your billing. All synced with municipalities and SEFAZ.

b10.desc: Complete Brand Kit with logo, colors, and AI that generates posts and videos synced with your DNA.

b11.desc: Sell recurring subscriptions to your clients. Cashback plans, automatic services, and benefits directly in the system.
